Apple Inc. was founded by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak in Cupertino, California in 1976.
The company launched the Macintosh computer in January 1984.
Tim Cook became CEO of Apple Inc. in August 2011 after Steve Jobs resigned due to illness.
Microsoft Corporation, led by Satya Nadella, is headquartered in Redmond, Washington.
In 2016, Microsoft acquired LinkedIn for $26.2 billion.
Elon Musk is the CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, both based in the United States.
